description_long: This is a stylized, chibi-style doll with a large head and small body proportions, featuring white hair with jagged, layered ends and a red hair clip on the left side. The doll has large, expressive brown eyes and a small, neutral mouth, giving it a cute and approachable appearance. It is dressed in a short-sleeved white blouse with a collar and a green plaid skirt, reminiscent of a school uniform. The doll's arms are outstretched to the sides, and it wears white socks and shoes. The overall design is smooth and cartoon-like, with simplified anatomical details and a matte finish. The doll appears to be made primarily of plastic, with painted details for the face and clothing.
description: A chibi-style doll with white hair, a red hair clip, large brown eyes, and a school uniform consisting of a white blouse and green plaid skirt.
description_view_0: The back view shows the doll's voluminous white hair and the green plaid skirt, with arms extended and no facial features visible.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the doll's profile, showing the layered hair, outstretched arm, and the side of the skirt and shoes.
description_view_2: The front view displays the doll's large brown eyes, red hair clip, white blouse, and green plaid skirt, with both arms extended.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, hair, and the outstretched arm.
attribute_clothing_style: Short-sleeved white blouse with a collar, paired with a green plaid pleated skirt, white socks, and white shoes; the outfit resembles a Japanese school uniform (seifuku) style.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms extended outward to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with large, open brown eyes, slightly raised eyebrows, and a small, closed mouth.
attribute_hair_style: Medium-length, layered white hair with jagged ends and a red hair clip on the left side.
